title: aster helenae
intro: Aster helenae, also known as Helen's Aster, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aster helenae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Aster helenae can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
